name: pulsating-button
title: Pulsating Button
description: An animated pulsating button useful for capturing attention of users.

0%, 100%.boxShadow: 0 0 0 0 var(--pulse-color, oklch(from var(--bg) l c h / 0.5))

50%.boxShadow: 0 0 0 var(--distance) var(--pulse-color, oklch(from var(--bg) l c h / 0.5))

0%.boxShadow: 0 0 0 0 oklch(from var(--pulse-color, var(--bg)) l c h / 1)

100%.boxShadow: 0 0 0 var(--distance) oklch(from var(--pulse-color, var(--bg)) l c h / 0)
